query: Taylor Swift The Life of a Showgirl album 2025 first week sales figures

{"query":"Taylor Swift The Life of a Showgirl album 2025 first week sales figures","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2073,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/music/news/taylor-swift-album-sales-first-day-billboard-million-showgirl-1236540366/","title":"Taylor Swift Sells 2.7 Million Copies of 'Life of a Showgirl' on Day 1","content":"Taylor Swift Sells 2.7 Million Copies of ‘The Life of a Showgirl’ on Day 1 — Already the Second-Best Tally for an Album’s First Week in History
Per Billboard, Luminate has reported that the album sold 2.7 million copies on Friday.
Swift still has six days of sales activity left to try to surpass that mark.
The record for an entire week was previously also held by Swift, who set it last year by selling 859,000 copies of “The Tortured Poets Department” in its first seven days, something she surpassed by more than 300,000 units in just one day."},{"url":"https://www.silive.com/entertainment/2025/10/idolized-pop-icons-latest-album-posts-second-largest-sales-week-in-modern-era.html","title":"Idolized pop icon’s latest album posts second-largest sales week in modern era","content":"Should “The Life of a Showgirl” debut at the top of the Billboard 200 chart,” it would become Swift’s 15th number one album.
All 14 of Swift’s full-length studio albums and re-recorded projects from 2008’s “Fearless”through 2024’s “The Tortured Poets Department” have debuted at No."},{"url":"https://www.billboard.com/music/chart-beat/taylor-swift-life-of-a-showgirl-first-day-sales-debut-week-1236082178/","title":"Taylor Swift 'Showgirl' Tracks Near Half-Billion Streams in U.S.","content":"Historic Streaming Numbers: According to initial reports to data tracking firm Luminate, the tracks on The Life of a Showgirl have generated more than 460 million on-demand official streams in the United States since the album’s release on Oct.
Life of a Showgirl’s official first-week numbers (equivalent album units, total traditional album sales and streaming figures) reflecting the tracking week of Oct.
She is currently tied with Drake and JAY-Z with 14 No.
3, the set sold 2.7 million copies in traditional album sales (physical and digital purchases) across all versions of the album, according to initial reports to data tracking firm Luminate.
After one day on sale, The Life of a Showgirl is the top-selling album of 2025 in the U.S., surpassing the 520,000 sold of The Weeknd’s Hurry Up Tomorrow, through the week ending Sept.
To compare, Swift’s last studio album, The Tortured Poets Department, had 19 different physical iterations available in its first week (nine CDs, six vinyl LPs and four cassettes) and two digital download versions (the standard 16-song album, and the surprise deluxe 31-song Anthology edition)."},{"url":"https://www.digitalmusicnews.com/2025/10/13/taylor-swift-showgirl-first-week-sales/","title":"Taylor Tops 4M+ First-Week Album Sales of ‘The Life of a Showgirl’","content":"In its first week, the album set a record for the highest number of equivalent album units in a single week, with 4.002 million units, according to Luminate data reported by Billboard.
That figure smashes the previous record by more than half a million.
Billboard reported that album sales alone totaled 3,479,500, while streaming added another 522,600.
That also follows the #1 she secured at the box office last week with “Taylor Swift: The Official Release Party of a Showgirl.” The event, which featured a combination of videos, commentary, and behind-the-scenes footage, made $33 million in theaters domestically over its three-day limited run."},{"url":"https://www.fox10tv.com/2025/10/07/taylor-swifts-life-showgirl-breaks-record-sells-27-million-copies-us-first-day/","title":"Taylor Swift’s ‘The Life of a Showgirl’ breaks record, sells 2.7 million copies in US on first day","content":"Taylor Swift’s 12th studio album, “The Life of a Showgirl,” sold 2.7 million copies in traditional album sales — which include physical and digital formats — in its first day in the U.S.
Currently, Adele’s “25,” which sold 3.378 million copies in its first week in 2015 in the U.S., holds the top spot."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Taylor Swift The Life of a Showgirl album 2025 first week sales figures","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/tonifitzgerald/2025/10/02/the-life-of-a-showgirl-sales-prediction-why-taylor-swift-could-sell-1-million-in-the-first-week-again","title":"Taylor Swift’s Life Of A Showgirl Sales Prediction","content":"# ‘The Life Of A Showgirl’ Sales Prediction: Why Taylor Swift Could Sell 1 Million In The First Week, Again. Her new album, \"The Life of a Showgirl,\" drops Friday. Will Taylor Swift’s *The Life of a Showgirl* album set another one? With Taylor Swift’s *The Life of a Showgirl*, many in the music industry expect the album to become one of just a handful in history to move at least 1 million units in its first week. The biggest first week of all time in the United States was Adele’s 2015 album *25*, which sold 3.378 million albums, according to Nielsen Music. ## 'The Life Of A Showgirl’ Sales Prediction. It’s also almost a foregone conclusion that, with this album, Swift will become the first female artist to surpass 100 million career album sales, according to the Recording Industry Association of America. ## Taylor Swift’s Records Before *Life Of A Showgirl*.","score":0.92260116,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://variety.com/2025/music/news/taylor-swift-debut-week-record-billboard-200-life-showgirl-1236547501","title":"Taylor Swift Debuts With Record-Smashing 4 Million Units ...","content":"“Showgirl” officially bowed with 4.002 million equivalent album units million units for its first week, in Luminate data reported by Billboard.","score":0.89849097,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.silive.com/entertainment/2025/10/idolized-pop-icons-latest-album-posts-second-largest-sales-week-in-modern-era.html","title":"Idolized pop icon's latest album posts second-largest sales ...","content":"Taylor Swift's latest album “The Life of a Showgirl” shattered sales records on its first day of release, selling 2.7 million copies in","score":0.8872928,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.usatoday.com/story/entertainment/music/2025/10/10/taylor-swift-album-sales-record-life-of-a-showgirl/86629171007","title":"Taylor Swift just broke another record with 'Life of a Showgirl'","content":"As for \"The Life of a Showgirl,\" total first-week consumption and pure album sales figures are expected to be finalized and announced on Sunday,","score":0.86767644,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://pitchfork.com/news/taylor-swift-beats-adeles-first-week-album-sales-record-with-the-life-of-a-showgirl","title":"Taylor Swift Beats Adele’s First-Week Album Sales Record With The Life of a Showgirl | Pitchfork","content":"# Taylor Swift Beats Adele’s First-Week Album Sales Record With *The Life of a Showgirl*. Swift’s new album surpasses Adele’s *25* with 3.5 million equivalent unit sales, and nears the record for actual copies sold. Taylor Swift has broken the first-week, equivalent-unit sales record long held by Adele for her 2015 album, *25*, making *The Life of a Showgirl* the fastest-selling-and-streaming album of the modern era, *Billboard* reports. Since its release, on Friday, October 3, *The Life of a Showgirl* has already hit 3.5 million equivalent unit sales—some 20,000 more than *25* amassed in its first week—according to initial reports from the data tracking firm Luminate. Adele still holds the record for actual albums sold, a metric that includes physical and digital sales but not streams; *25* racked up 3.378 million to *The Life of a Showgirl’s* 3.2 million. 5 Takeaways From Taylor Swift’s New Album *The Life of a Showgirl*.","score":0.854509,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.96,"request_id":"8ad809af-fba7-40ca-a2b7-32b563b7be0a"}
